goal: Bind each showcase demo to public datasets or published-label sources and standard objective metrics.

metric_policy.gold_standard_rule: Gold labels must come from public datasets, official benchmark folds, published supplementary labels, or deterministic labels derived from public structures/spectra. DeerFlow must not see gold labels during front-end execution.
metric_policy.evaluation_rule: Independent scripts compare DeerFlow artifacts with held-out gold labels using standard metrics.

registry.recommended_dataset: COD-derived CIF candidate set with simulated unknown XRD patterns; optional RRUFF empirical mineral XRD subset when raw peak files are available.

public_sources.name: Crystallography Open Database
public_sources.role: Public crystal structures in CIF format; gold material identity is the COD ID or formula.

public_sources.name: RRUFF Database
public_sources.role: Empirical mineral spectra, chemistry, and XRD records for real-sample phase identification.

gold_standard.label: true_candidate_id
gold_standard.construction: For simulated tasks, choose one public CIF as the hidden true phase, simulate its powder XRD, optionally add controlled peak noise/dropout, then mix with distractor CIFs. For empirical RRUFF tasks, use the RRUFF mineral/sample identity as the label.

registry.recommended_dataset: Matbench v0.1 task such as matbench_expt_gap for composition-to-band-gap regression or matbench_glass for classification.

public_sources.name: Matbench
public_sources.role: Official materials property prediction benchmark with curated tasks and folds.

gold_standard.label: official Matbench target column and fold split
gold_standard.construction: Use official Matbench task data and folds. DeerFlow receives only train data and test features; evaluator keeps test labels.

registry.recommended_dataset: MoleculeNet BBBP/HIV/ClinTox/Tox21 for classification or ESOL/FreeSolv for regression; local ChemLLMBench copies can be used when source revision is recorded.

public_sources.name: MoleculeNet
public_sources.role: Official molecular machine learning benchmark family.

public_sources.name: MoleculeNet paper
public_sources.role: Defines molecular ML tasks, splits, featurizations, and recommended metrics.

gold_standard.label: official property labels
gold_standard.construction: Use scaffold/fixed train-test split. DeerFlow receives train labels and test SMILES only; evaluator keeps held-out labels.

registry.recommended_dataset: Azobenzene IR/Raman spectra to C-N=N-C dihedral labels from the d5sc08794e paper data or its released repository.

public_sources.name: d5sc08794e local paper
public_sources.role: Reference workflow and metrics: spectra-to-dihedral prediction with MAE and correlation.

gold_standard.label: DFT or released dihedral angle
gold_standard.construction: Use released spectrum-angle pairs. DeerFlow receives train spectra/angles and held-out spectra only; evaluator keeps held-out angles.

registry.recommended_dataset: DIVE-style annotated materials extraction set, paper supplementary annotations, or a small public benchmark subset with manually annotated fields.

public_sources.name: d5sc09921h local paper
public_sources.role: Reference workflow and metrics: extraction accuracy/completeness and precision/recall/F1.

gold_standard.label: manual annotation table
gold_standard.construction: Use an existing public annotation table when available. If no public annotation exists, this demo is workflow-only and must not be reported as a formal quantitative score.
